# AI Readiness Demo App

> Public test bed for the `improve-ai-readiness` agent-readiness framework.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/
- Sitemap: https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/sitemap.xml
- Agent instructions: https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/AGENTS.md
- Agent skills: https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
- API catalog: https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/.well-known/api-catalog

## Recommended Reading Order

1. https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/
2. https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/AGENTS.md
3. https://ai-readiness-demo-app.vercel.app/.well-known/agent-skills/site-guide/SKILL.md

## Agent Notes

- This is a public demo site, not a production service.
- Request `Accept: text/markdown` on `/` for a Markdown representation of the homepage.
- Respect `robots.txt` and `Content-Signal` preferences.
